obligations.rule: Return false if the input is null, empty, or contains invalid characters like spaces or angle brackets.
obligations.why: Ensure early return for invalid input formats.

obligations.rule: Return false if the URL starts with 'mailto:'.
obligations.why: Special case handling for mailto URLs.

obligations.rule: Enforce maximum URL length if validate_length is true.
obligations.why: Ensure URLs exceeding max_allowed_length are rejected.

obligations.rule: Cover the condition at line 66: `options.validate_length && url.length > options.max_allowed_length`.
obligations.why: This condition checks whether the URL exceeds the maximum allowed length when `validate_length` is enabled.

obligations.rule: Cover the condition at line 70: `!options.allow_fragments && includes(url, '#')`.
obligations.why: This condition ensures that URLs containing fragments are rejected when `allow_fragments` is disabled.

obligations.rule: Cover the condition at line 74: `!options.allow_query_components && (includes(url, '?') || includes(url, '&'))`.
obligations.why: This condition ensures that URLs containing query components are rejected when `allow_query_components` is disabled.

obligations.rule: Cover the condition at line 124: `if (at_position !== -1)` and its true/false branches.
obligations.why: This condition checks for the presence of an '@' symbol in the URL, which is critical for distinguishing authentication components from protocols.

obligations.rule: Cover the condition at line 136: `if (options.require_protocol)` and its true/false branches.
obligations.why: This condition enforces the presence of a protocol when the `require_protocol` option is enabled.

obligations.rule: Cover the condition at line 214: `if (auth.indexOf(':') >= 0 && auth.split(':').length > 2)` and its true/false branches.
obligations.why: This condition validates the structure of the authentication component in the URL, ensuring it does not contain malformed or excessive colons.

obligations.rule: Ensure URLs with invalid authentication components are rejected.
obligations.why: Targets uncovered statement at line 127 and related branches for validating authentication components.

obligations.rule: Ensure URLs with encoded malicious content in authentication are rejected.
obligations.why: Targets uncovered statement at line 132 and related branches for detecting encoded malicious content.

obligations.rule: Ensure URLs with invalid port numbers are rejected.
obligations.why: Targets uncovered statement at line 241 and related branches for validating port numbers.

obligations.rule: Cover uncovered statement at line 99: return false;
obligations.why: This statement is reached when an invalid protocol is detected and `require_valid_protocol` is true.

obligations.rule: Cover uncovered statement at line 118: after_colon.indexOf('/');
obligations.why: This statement is reached when parsing the portion of the URL after the colon to identify the first slash.

obligations.rule: Cover uncovered branch at line 124: if (at_position !== -1).
obligations.why: This branch is taken when the portion of the URL before the first slash contains an '@' symbol, indicating potential authentication information.

test_groups.title: Basic input validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers early returns for null, empty, or invalid characters in input.

test_groups.title: Special case: mailto URLs
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs starting with 'mailto:' are rejected.

test_groups.title: Maximum URL length enforcement
test_groups.rationale: Tests enforcement of maximum URL length when validate_length is true.

test_groups.title: Maximum URL length with validate_length option
test_groups.rationale: Tests the enforcement of maximum URL length when `validate_length` is enabled.

test_groups.title: Fragment handling with allow_fragments option
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs with fragments are rejected when `allow_fragments` is disabled.

test_groups.title: Query components handling with allow_query_components option
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs with query components are rejected when `allow_query_components` is disabled.

test_groups.title: Authentication component handling
test_groups.rationale: Covers the presence of '@' in the URL and validates the structure of the authentication component.

test_groups.title: Protocol requirement enforcement
test_groups.rationale: Ensures that URLs without a protocol are rejected when `require_protocol` is enabled.

test_groups.title: Authentication component validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests validation of authentication components, targeting uncovered statement at line 127.

test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of invalid protocols when `require_valid_protocol` is enabled, targeting uncovered statement at line 99.

test_groups.title: Parsing after colon for first slash
test_groups.rationale: Tests parsing of the portion after the colon to identify the first slash, targeting uncovered statement at line 118.

test_groups.title: Authentication component detection
